title: arabis lyrata var. glabra
intro: Arabis lyrata var. glabra, also known as smooth rockcress, is a perennial plant species in the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Arabis lyrata var. glabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote tissue repair. It is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and can also be used topically as a salve or ointment, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
